message: 🌱 Add vitess: Bug Report: `SELECT *` expansion only considers subquery in mission (#587)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vitess-11880-bug-report-select-expansion-only-considers-subquery-in-column-list-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vitess: Bug Report: `SELECT *` expansion only considers subquery in column list on unsharded queries",
+    "description": "Bug Report: `SELECT *` expansion only considers subquery in column list on unsharded queries. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify vitess troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your vitess deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess -n vitess --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vitess configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess\nkubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess\n```\n### Overview of the Issue\n\n encountered a bug where a subquery in the columns list of an inner query would be the only column expanded by the `SELECT *` expression of the outer query. This bug only exists in the Gen4 planner."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Bug Report: `SELECT *` expansion only considers subquery in",
+        "description": "Before planning a query, vtgate will simplify the query. One of the simplifications is to expand `*` outputs in the query.\nThis is only done if we have enough schema information about the tables in the query.\n\nThe issue reported in #11880 is related to a derived table where we don't have enough information to expand the columns. Before this fix, we would just use whatever column information we had, which is not correct.\n\nThis PR changes the semantic analysis so it keeps track in more places if\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Bug Report: `SELECT *` expansion only considers is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess -n vitess --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Before planning a query, vtgate will simplify the query. One of the simplifications is to expand `*` outputs in the query.\nThis is only done if we have enough schema information about the tables in the query.\n\nThe issue reported in #11880 is related to a derived table where we don't have enough information to expand the columns.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vitess",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "vitess"
